chain.thought: Explanation: The question implies finding a type of item that two people share. In the “car” column, two car types are each used by two drivers: “honda prelude chevrolet” (by John Briggs and James Phillip) and “mazda rx-7” (by Danny Osborne and Ivan Mikac). Therefore, the shared “type of something” is the car type.
